info.title: TicketLens Tour Search API
info.description: MCP server for TicketLens destination experiences search and POI resolution

post.description: Search TicketLens destination experiences. Results may include guided tours, attraction tickets, hop-on hop-off buses, sports tickets, event tickets, and other activities.

items.title: Eiffel Tower Guided Tour by Elevator: Reserved Entry

errors.msg: at least one of query, poi, city, destination, or destination.destination_id is required

example.title: Unprocessable Request
example.detail: Destination context is ambiguous; narrow the city or country filter

409.description: User action is required to resolve the request

get.description: Fetch the canonical TicketLens record for an experience returned by search_tours. The /v1/tours/{tour_id} resource may represent a guided tour, attraction ticket, event product, or similar experience.

example.title: Eiffel Tower Guided Tour by Elevator

details.title_en: Eiffel Tower Guided Tour by Elevator

errors.msg: at least one of query, poi, city, destination, or destination.destination_id is required

example.title: Unprocessable Request
example.detail: Destination context is ambiguous; narrow the city or country filter

post.description: Resolve points of interest before calling the experience search endpoint.

errors.msg: at least one of query, poi, city, destination, or destination.destination_id is required

example.title: Unprocessable Request
example.detail: Destination context is ambiguous; narrow the city or country filter

get.description: Fetch a point of interest by its canonical TicketLens POI ID.
